_meta.description: Unified exact-mass data for the FormulaM static web app. Isotope-resolved records are stored once; ordinary element symbols resolve through default_isotope_by_symbol.
_meta.default_element_behavior: element symbols map to default_isotope_by_symbol, then use the corresponding isotope record exact_mass
_meta.source: Generated from RDKit 2025.09.4 PeriodicTable data in the ChatGPT build environment because the repository data/masses.json blob is too large for the GitHub connector to inline.
_meta.note: For strict continuity with FormulaM-py, replace this file with the current data/masses.json from the FormulaM repository if desired.
